stemHtml: Aircraft A follows a TCAS RA and deviates from clearance. Simultaneously, aircraft B declares distress. Aircraft A is ready to report. What should A do?

options.a: Wait for B to finish — distress has priority over all messages.
options.b: Interrupt to report the ACAS RA — similar messages take priority.
options.c: Interrupt — the ACAS RA is treated as urgency, which outranks other messages.
options.d: Wait because aircraft B started transmitting first.
